question: Which students have 2 or more answer records? Give me their first names.
sql: SELECT First_Name FROM Students WHERE Student_ID IN (SELECT Student_ID FROM Student_Answers GROUP BY Student_ID HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2);

back_translation.intent: 获取在Student_Answers表中至少有两次记录的学生的First_Name
filters: Student_ID IN (SELECT Student_ID FROM Student_Answers GROUP BY Student_ID HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2)

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致，SQL反向翻译准确获取了原始问题中要求的学生信息，即至少有两次答案记录的学生的First_Name。
